creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->feedback

Here are the results.  *note* that this is on amd64, and now that I've 
done it that way, I wonder if we need to do it on i386 to get more 
complete coverage.  (We need to think about this).  Unfortunately, we 
have far more amd64 build horsepower than i386 right now, so it will 
take a while.
